title: acmella alba
intro: Acmella alba, also known as the toothache plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating toothaches and other oral health issues. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its ability to numb the pain and reduce inflammation, providing relief from toothache, gum inflammation, and mouth ulcers. Acmella alba can be consumed as a herbal tea, infusion, or used topically as a paste, allowing for various preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
